text: The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

text: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

text: When they go low, we go high.
author: Michelle Obama

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Democracy is not a spectator sport.
author: Marian Wright Edelman

text: A budget is a moral document.
author: Bernie Sanders

text: The vote is precious. It is almost sacred.
author: John Lewis

text: Get in good trouble, necessary trouble.
author: John Lewis

text: Health care is a human right, not a privilege.
author: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

text: Freedom is never given; it is won.
author: A. Philip Randolph
